title: Oricraft
description: Oricraft is a modpack based on Oritech. | Automate the World!
body:
Oricraft is a modpack themed around the Oritech mod. This pack is basically in super early Alpha. So its a bit laggy. Please report any bugs and Ill try to fix them. 

Key Mods:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
- Oritech
- Better Nether/End
- Better Combat + Combat Roll + Guarding
- Expanded Storage
- Dungeons & Taverns
- Vic's Point Blank (1.0.1+)
- Essetinal + Other Multiplayer Mods

</details>

Main Resource Packs:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Moves
- Whimscape
- Colourful Containters Dark Mode
- Even Better Encahntments

</details>



Im still learning packdev so things are still very kitch sink-y. Will be updating when more tech mods become available for 1.21
